thread.section_title: Madison, WI Local News and More | NewsBreak

author: NewsBreak Original
text: MADISON, Wis. -- A 16-year-old was arrested Sunday after an investigation regarding several recent shootings in Madison. The teen was taken into custody at around 9:05 a.m. at a home located on Loomis Circle. He was taken to the Juvenile Reception Center and faces charges of first-degree recklessly endangering safety and possession of a weapon by a person under 18. Police said they found four guns and ammunition at the teenager's home. It is believed that the teenager was a suspect for recent cases where shots were fired. The 16-year-old is also a suspect for multiple cases, some of which include a stray bullet coming within mere feet f rom from two children and 80 shell casings being found at a damaged apartment . Both of these incidents happened in October. Another 17-year-old living at the same home was taken into custody on a probation hold. COPYRIGHT 2024 BY CHANNEL 3000. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED. THIS MATERIAL MAY NOT BE PUBLISHED, BROADCAST, REWRITTEN OR REDISTRIBUTED.
